sentiment.reasoning: A decline in new customer orders directly signals weakening demand and potential revenue headwinds for the upcoming quarter.

headlines.headline: Orevex Renewables files routine patent applications in supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard corporate activity and do not provide immediate material financial impact or competitive advantage.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
